_comment: Mission-1 batch Phase-3 STAGED reconcile candidates - human approves in the Map client panel. Evidence pulled 2026-07-22/23 (read-only). 'preview' = whole-history BQ totals in the account's native currency (AUD unless the USD flag applies).
preparedBy: Mission-1 batch prep session (Claude) - see PHASE3_BATCH_PREP_REPORT.md
platformAudit: Five scoped sources (Meta ACRS / Meta BuyerX / TTD ACRS / TTD Altech / TTD WEHI - the last two added to the spec this run). Every campaign name in every scope is claimed by exactly one rule: Meta-ACRS 3 names -> ACRS_Always_On (2) + BOINZ (1); Meta-BuyerX 1 -> 1; TTD 1+1+3 -> one rule each. Zero overlap, zero leftovers within scope.
warnings: SPELLING TRAPS (three in one client): Grid 'Altec' = BQ advertiser 'Altech'; Grid 'BIONZ' = BQ campaign token 'BOINZ'; the BOINZ campaign lives inside the ACRS Meta account, not its own.

CURRENCY: the Buyer X row carries the sheet's 'Currency in USD' remark - if the BuyerX Meta account bills USD, approving writes USD into the AUD grid (no FX in the sync). Resolve before approving that pair.

BILLED BASIS: Windsor TTD cost = client-billed - Altech ($2,639.98 vs sheet $2,639.88) and WEHI ($4,113.83 vs $4,113.82) prove it to the cent here. All 3 TTD rows have NULL spendMult -> set 1 (staged) or clientSpend freezes at sheet values.
The TTD null-name row must be NAMED before its pair can be approved (suggest 'ACRS AlwaysOn').
platformMargin is NULL on all 3 TTD rows - set to the 0.60-0.65 standard with approval.
Every row is Ended/Not Active - backfill needs ?client=Ad Assembly&includeEnded=1.

pairs.rationale: 1 campaign (Altech_Brand_Awareness_May2026_Display_AU): $2,639.98 vs sheet clientSpend $2,639.88 - to the cent. May flight matches the row exactly. spendMult null -> 1.

3 campaigns (Awareness Display $2,400.02 + Awareness Video $1,099.98 + Retargeting Display $613.83) summing $4,113.83 vs sheet clientSpend $4,113.82 - to the cent. Row dates say May; the campaigns' date rows linger to 07-21 with no extra spend. spendMult null -> 1.

FLAGGED: the Grid row has NO NAME. Dates align (row 04-14..05-31; campaign starts 04-14) but BQ shows $980.04 with spend through 07-07 vs the sheet's $705 clientSpend. Name the row first (suggest 'ACRS AlwaysOn'), then approve if $980 billed is accepted. spendMult null -> 1.

2 campaigns (Meta_Conversion $763.16 + Meta_Traffic $626.41 = $1,389.57) vs sheet clientSpend $1,071 (+30% unexplained - possibly the sheet only counted one of the two; Conversion alone is $763). Token excludes the BOINZ campaign. Human eyeball. Media basis - no mult change.

1 campaign (ACRS_BOINZ_2026_Conference_May2026-Meta_Traffic_AU, $1,306.40, 04-24..30) - BQ spells it BOINZ and it sits in the ACRS account. The sheet row has NO spend recorded (nulls), so BQ fills a blank rather than confirming one - hence medium despite unambiguous membership. Row dates (04-15..05-03) are compatible.

FLAGGED for currency: 1 campaign (Buyer_AlwaysOn_May2026-Meta_Conversion_AU) $5,811.69 vs sheet clientSpend $6,322.08 (-8%). The sheet flags this row 'Currency in USD' - if the account bills USD the -8% is a broken comparison and approving writes USD into an AUD grid. Resolve the account currency first.

spendMultResets.reason: Windsor TTD cost = client-billed (proven to the cent on this row)
Windsor TTD cost = client-billed (proven to the cent on this row)
Windsor TTD cost = client-billed - only with the flagged pair's approval
